description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.5 Docker image and a global before_script that installs numpy via pip3. Define three stages: test, package, and deploy, and set a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs pip3 install coveralls, coverage run --source=meteorology setup.py test, coverage html, coverage report, and moves htmlcov/ to $COVERAGE_STATIC_DIR, publishing $COVERAGE_STATIC_DIR as a one-week artifact and extracting the TOTAL coverage percentage; also add a pip-install-local job that runs pip3 install --prefix=~/.local . . In the package stage add a dist job that runs ./setup.py sdist and stores dist/* as a one-week artifact, and a sphinx job that installs sphinx and sphinx_rtd_theme, runs make docs, moves docs/_build/html to $SPHINX_DOC_DIR and publishes it as a one-week artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on tags, clears $PAGES_DIR, moves $SPHINX_DOC_DIR and $COVERAGE_STATIC_DIR into $PAGES_DIR, and publishes $PAGES_DIR as the GitLab Pages artifact, depending on sphinx and coverage; also add a pypi-upload job that runs only on tags, depends on dist, and uploads the built distribution to PyPI in the production environment.
